title: Unidentified Yavin Runner II pilot
content:

{{Quote|We'll be arriving at the Academy in just a few minutes.|''Yavin Runner II'' pilot to Jedi passengers|<ref name="Jedi Academy" />}}
A [[Human/Legends|Human]] '''pilot''' with [[Color/Legends|blue]] [[Eye/Legends|eyes]] was in command of the ''[[Yavin Runner II]]'', a four-[[Engine/Legends|engined]] [[Shuttle/Legends|shuttle]] that ferried [[Jedi Initiate/Legends|Jedi students]], including [[Jaden Korr]] and [[Rosh Penin]], of the [[New Jedi Order]]. The shuttle took students to the [[Jedi Praxeum]] on [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]], a forested [[Moon/Legends|moon]] of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Yavin Prime/Legends|Yavin Prime]],<ref name="Jedi Academy" /> in [[14 ABY/Legends|14 ABY]].<ref name="Date">According to ''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight: Jedi Academy]]'', the events in the game take place ten [[Standard year/Legends|years]] after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], which according to ''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' is placed in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]].</ref>

Dressed in a uniform<ref name="Jedi Academy" /> similar to the ones worn by [[Rebel trooper/Legends|Rebel troopers]] at the [[Time/Legends|time]] of the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]],<ref name="Episode 4">{{Film|IV}}</ref> the [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] was at the controls when one of its engines was damaged by the [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]] [[Tavion Axmis]]. The pilot guided the craft to a safe emergency landing several kilometers west of the Jedi Praxeum. No one was substantively injured during the landing, and [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] managed to contact the pilot using a [[Comm unit/Legends|comm unit]]. The pilot then led the students on foot to a [[Unidentified Massassi temple|nearby Massassi temple]] where they were all retrieved by an Academy shuttle.<ref name="Jedi Academy" />

==Behind the scenes==
This pilot first appeared at the beginning of the [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight: Jedi Academy]]'', released in [[2003]], and was voiced by [[Nick Jameson]].<ref name="Jedi Academy" />
